title: Update fall market schedule
body: Summer markets wrapped up. Need to swap in the fall lineup: add the Hillsdale Sunday market and remove the two stalls that ended in August so customers can find us.

title: Fix mobile menu layout on small screens
body: On phones under 360px the menu drawer overflows and the tourtiere photos get cut off. Drawer needs a max-width and vertical scroll.

title: Add online catering inquiry form
body: People keep DMing the Instagram to ask about catering. Add a simple inquiry form to the site that captures event date, headcount, and tourtiere count.

title: Compress hero photos for faster load
body: The market hero shots are around 4MB each and the homepage is slow on mobile data. Convert to WebP and target under 300KB each.

title: Add fall 2025 market schedule
body: Updates the market schedule section with the fall lineup and drops the ended summer stalls. Closes #1.

title: Add catering inquiry form
body: Adds a Netlify Forms inquiry form with event date, headcount, and tourtiere count fields plus a honeypot for spam. Closes #3.

title: Add tourtiere size and quantity dropdown
body: The inquiry helper should let people pick a size (6-inch, 9-inch, family-size) and a quantity instead of typing it free-form so I can quote faster.

title: Add size and quantity dropdown
body: Replaces the free-text size field with size and quantity dropdowns and updates the quote preview. Closes #1.
